Code fragment: public final TableField<UserRecord, UserRole> ROLE = createField(DSL.name("role"), SQLDataType.VARCHAR(7).nullable(false).defaultValue(DSL.inline("USER", SQLDataType.VARCHAR)).asEnumDataType(com.bfa.models.enums.UserRole.class), this, "");
Explanation: The 'role' column uses an ENUM type to restrict allowed values, which makes adding or removing roles difficult without schema changes. Consider creating a separate 'roles' lookup table and referencing it with a foreign key.

Code fragment: public final TableField<UserRecord, UserStatus> STATUS = createField(DSL.name("status"), SQLDataType.VARCHAR(8).nullable(false).defaultValue(DSL.inline("ACTIVE", SQLDataType.VARCHAR)).asEnumDataType(com.bfa.models.enums.UserStatus.class), this, "");
